message: Can I afford a vacation to Goa in December if I save ₹2,000 less this month?

- Maintaining the current savings of ₹37,301 this month would allow you to save an additional ₹2,000 towards your house goal over 5 years.
- Saving ₹2,000 less this month will result in a shortfall of approximately ₹10,000 for your house goal over the same period.
- Affording a vacation to Goa in December with the savings reduction is feasible, as it would only impact about 3% of your total monthly surplus.
- To buy a house in Hyderabad within 5 years, you need to save approximately ₹27,600 per month, which includes the current surplus plus additional savings.
